title: 🔥 ARM: $157.07 (+16.38%)
summary: ARM 현재가 157.07, 일간 변동 +16.38%, 거래량 29,484,555 (평균 대비 6.1배 — 자금 이동 포착!)

title: Why Memory Stocks Crashed Today: TurboQuant Just Changed The Game With "Google's DeepSeek Moment"
summary:
Why Memory Stocks Crashed Today: TurboQuant Just Changed The Game With "Google's DeepSeek Moment"

            With stocks closing solidly in the green despite some painful wobbles during the day, one sector was a notable laggard: the same sector that had dramatically outperformed the S&P since memory prices soared last October: memory stocks, most notably MU and SNDK.

In his EOD wrap, Goldman tech specialist Peter Callahan wrote that while there wasn't that much actual "angst" out there, his c
summary_ko: TurboQuant의 'Google의 DeepSeek Moment'으로 메모리 스톡이 급락했다. 이는 메모리 기술의 새로운 패러다임을 나타낼 수 있다.

title: STAT+: A 2023 health AI bet that seems to be paying off
summary: In this edition of STAT's AI Prognosis: A chat with Qualified Health co-founder and CEO, Justin Norden, as the company raises $125 million.
summary_ko: 건강 AI 분야의 스타트업 Qualified Health가 1억 2500만 달러를 투자받았다.

title: Merck to buy Terns in $6.7B bet on a ‘differentiated’ leukemia drug
summary: If consummated, the deal would hand Merck a treatment that could challenge Novartis’ fast-selling Scemblix. But the low purchase premium — which one analyst described as a "steal" — may leave room for a competing bid.
summary_ko: Merck가 Terns Pharmaceuticals를 67억 달러에 인수하기로 했다.

title: FDA approves Denali's Hunter syndrome drug, handing rare disease community a win
summary: The FDA has approved Denali Therapeutics’ enzyme replacement therapy for a genetic lysosomal storage disease after a string of high-profile rejections for rare disease candidates.
summary_ko: FDA는 Denali의 헌터 증후군 치료제를 승인했습니다. 이는 희귀병 치료 시장에서 새로운 기회를 제공할 수 있습니다.

title: Merck, girding for Keytruda cliff, flies toward promising CML asset with $6.7B Terns acquisition
summary: Merck and Terns Pharmaceuticals have agreed to a $6.7 billion all-cash buyout that delivers a prized leukemia asset to the New Jersey Big Pharma.
summary_ko: Merck는 Terns Pharmaceuticals를 67억 달러에 인수하여 백혈병 치료 자산을 확보하였다. 이는 Merck의 주요 약물 Keytruda의 수익성 감소에 대비한 전략이다.

title: Microneedle vaccine patch company raises $50M for pivot to GLP-1 delivery
summary:
Fourteen years ago, a group of Harvard Business School students launched a startup called Vaxess Technologies with a goal to disrupt the vaccine industry by replacing needles with a simple skin patch.
 Getting the technology ...
summary_ko: 미크로니들 백신 패치 회사인 Vaxess Technologies가 GLP-1 전달로 사업 방향을 전환하기 위해 5,000만 달러를 투자받았다. 이는 백신 산업에서 새로운 기술을 적용하려는 시도이다.

title: Adonis Scores $40M for AI Platform Aiming to Boost Hospital Revenue
summary:
Adonis raised a $40 million Series C funding round to help hospitals use AI to tackle denied and underpaid claims. Its platform automates manual revenue cycle tasks and provides real-time insights, which allows staff to focus on higher-value work. Customers include Mount Sinai Health System, Baptist Health South Florida, AdventHealth and ApolloMD.
The post Adonis Scores $40M for AI Platform Aiming to Boost Hospital Revenue appeared first on MedCity News.
summary_ko: Adonis는 병원 수익을 높이기 위한 AI 플랫폼 개발을 위해 4,000만 달러의 시리즈 C 자금을 투자받았다. 이는 의료 분야에서 AI 기술의 적용이 증가하고 있다.

title: The FDA Is Fast-Tracking Health AI —Women’s Health Can’t Be Left Behind
summary:
Our biggest healthcare problems aren’t only cost or access, but the breakdown in how diagnoses are made, especially for women. Digital health’s new era of AI and real-time data is the most promising solution I’ve seen to fix this, but for these tools to work for women, they must be built on data that actually includes them.
The post The FDA Is Fast-Tracking Health AI —Women’s Health Can’t Be Left Behind appeared first on MedCity News.
summary_ko: FDA는 건강 AI를 빠르게 추진하고 있으며, 여성 건강은 뒤처져서는 안 된다. 디지털 헬스의 새로운 시대인 AI와 실시간 데이터는 가장 유망한 해결책이다.

title: Gilead Sciences Gains an Opportunity for Immune System Reset With $1.7B Ouro Acquisition
summary:
Gilead Sciences is acquiring Ouro Medicines, a startup developing T cell engagers for a range of autoimmune diseases. Separately, Gilead is negotiating a deal with Galapagos to share in the development and potential commercialization of the Ouro drug. 
The post Gilead Sciences Gains an Opportunity for Immune System Reset With $1.7B Ouro Acquisition appeared first on MedCity News.
summary_ko: Gilead Sciences는 Ouro Medicines를 17억 달러에 인수하여 면역계 리셋을 위한 새로운 기회를 얻었다.

title: STAT+: FDA approves Denali Therapeutics drug for Hunter syndrome
summary: The FDA approved a new medicine from Denali Therapeutics for Hunter syndrome, a notable decision by the agency after a string of rejections of rare disease drugs.
summary_ko: FDA가 헌터 증후군 치료제를 승인했다.

title: STAT+: Pharmalittle: We’re reading about a Merck acquisition, the rise of former Loxo execs at Lilly, and more
summary: Merck intends to buy Terns Pharmaceuticals, the developer of a promising leukemia treatment, for $6.7 billion
summary_ko: Merck가 Terns Pharmaceuticals를 67억 달러에 인수하기로 했다.

title: Gilead, with Ouro deal, wagers $1.7B on bispecifics for autoimmune diseases
summary: Acquiring Ouro Medicines, which launched last year, hands Gilead an antibody designed to bind to BCMA and CD3, a pair of immune cell proteins that are popular targets for drugmakers.
summary_ko: Gilead는 Ouro Medicines를 인수하여 17억 달러를 투자하고, 자가면역질환 치료를 위한 바이스펙틱스 기술에 베팅했습니다. 이는 자가면역질환 치료 시장에서 새로운 기회를 제공할 수 있습니다.

title: Sarepta's big bet on Arrowhead's siRNA assets yields early data
summary: Sarepta Therapeutics has shared initial clinical data on two siRNA candidates, delivering an early look at the wisdom of its decision to bet big on Arrowhead Pharmaceuticals’ pipeline.
summary_ko: Sarepta Therapeutics는 Arrowhead Pharmaceuticals의 siRNA 자산에 대한 초기 임상 데이터를 공개하였다. 이는 Sarepta의 Arrowhead에 대한 투자에 대한 초기 평가이다.

title: Novo Nordisk prepares to go global as triple-G prospect passes midphase diabetes test in China
summary: Novo Nordisk and its Chinese partner have reported another midphase win for their triple G candidate, sharing diabetes data to add to the momentum generated by an obesity readout. But while the data suggest the asset is competitive, Eli Lilly’s headstart in the space means it remains the company to beat.
summary_ko: Novo Nordisk의 3중 G 후보물질은 중간 단계 임상 시험에서 당뇨병 치료 효과를 보여주었다. 이는 Novo Nordisk의 글로벌 시장 진출을 위한 중요한 단계이다.

title: After tumultuous year, Sarepta plots rebound with early data on RNA therapies
summary:
Sarepta Therapeutics reported promise in initial findings from clinical studies of two RNA muscle disease treatments, as the company maps out a future beyond its controversial Duchenne muscular dystrophy therapies.

 Sarepta is developing RNA treatments ...
summary_ko: Sarepta Therapeutics는 RNA 치료제의 초기 결과가 약속을 보여주고 있습니다. 이는 회사의 미래를 위한 중요한 단계입니다.

title: Beam looks to accelerated approval for AATD base editing after promising update
summary:
Beam Therapeutics has provided a much-awaited update on its therapy that uses a form of CRISPR called base editing to precisely fix a single genetic typo responsible for a rare genetic disease.
 On Wednesday,
summary_ko: Beam Therapeutics는 희귀 유전병 치료를 위한 기초 편집 기술을 사용하는 치료제의 업데이트 결과를 발표했습니다.

title: Maze meets own expectations in Phase 2 kidney disease trial in the same arena as Vertex
summary:
Maze Therapeutics unveiled positive mid-stage data for its genetic kidney disease drug that could spell major competition for Vertex Pharmaceuticals’ program that has the same target.

 Maze’s candidate, codenamed MZE829, produced an average 35.6% reduction ...
summary_ko: Maze Therapeutics는 Vertex Pharmaceuticals와 같은 목표를 가진 유전자 신장 질환 약물에 대한 중간 단계 데이터를 공개했다. 이는 신장 질환 치료 분야에서 새로운 경쟁자가 등장할 수 있다.

title: Merck’s $6.7B Terns Acquisition Positions It to Challenge a Blockbuster Novartis Cancer Drug
summary:
Merck has been acquiring assets that could help make up for the coming revenue decline as its top product, the cancer drug Keytruda, drops off the patent cliff.  Terns Pharmaceuticals’ lead product candidate, in development for treating a type of leukemia, could offer dosing and efficacy advantages over the Novartis drug Scemblix.
The post Merck’s $6.7B Terns Acquisition Positions It to Challenge a Blockbuster Novartis Cancer Drug appeared first on MedCity News.
summary_ko: Merck는 Terns Pharmaceuticals를 67억 달러에 인수하여 노바티스사의 암 치료 약물에 도전할 수 있는 자리를 마련했다.

title: How A Small Rural Hospital Is Using AI to Catch Heart Disease Sooner
summary:
At Wayne General Hospital in rural Mississippi, clinicians are using Eko Health’s AI-powered digital stethoscope to detect heart conditions earlier in patients with limited access to specialists. 
The post How A Small Rural Hospital Is Using AI to Catch Heart Disease Sooner appeared first on MedCity News.
summary_ko: 미시시피 주의 한 소규모 시골 병원이 AI를 사용하여 심장 질환을 조기에 발견하고 있다.
